title: bellidastrum michelii
intro: Bellidastrum michelii, also known as Belladonna or Deadly Nightshade, is a perennial plant with shiny black berries and purple flowers. It contains tropane alkaloids, which have medicinal properties, including pain relief and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Belladonna include its ability to treat conditions such as migraine headaches, Parkinson's disease, and motion sickness, due to its anticholinergic properties. Herbal preparations of Belladonna include dried leaves and berries, which can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, but caution should be exercised due to its toxicity.
